reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text:
We arrived to the Renaissance Hotel in Lamai Beach, Koh Samui on August 6, 2017. It was our 9th day in Thailand after touring Koh Phangan, which was an amazing experience but that’s beside the point.

First of all, the service was good at the hotel and the hotel is situated in a beautiful location. We booked a deluxe room in advance and when we arrived, we were told there are 2 elevators that take you to the room and that one is not working. Since we were with twin strollers, we asked to switch rooms and they offered to upgrade us 7000thb for three nights. We took it because we had no choice. 

When we woke up the first morning, we had bites all over our bodies. Our 6th month old baby had marks on his stomach and our two-year old had bites on his legs, arms, face and shoulders. I had bites all over my back.
Our kids could not stop their discomfort and complaints. I was sure it was the mosquitos. 

But on second thought, we did not go outside once. It was nighttime and we kept the doors closed to prevent mosquitos from coming in. We called the reception to request another mosquito net and went to sleep. The next morning, we got up and we were all ridden with painful bites. 

By the third night, my husband and I felt the bugs on the mattress. We couldn’t sleep at all. Our children weren’t able to sleep either and the two year old was yelling that there was something in his bed. We left the room at 5am.

It turned out that we had more than 6,000 bed bug bites all together! We went straight to the manager of the hotel, who claimed that we brought them in from outside. The hotel made sure to bring us a medical staff and the doctor told us that it’s just an allergic reaction. Four people had the same allergic reaction, really?

We were told that the room had been cleaned and was closed for a week (a five-star hotel closes a room for a week to clean?) Cleaning takes 24-48 hours at the most. Unless there were bed bugs previously, I presume. My husband returned to the room l

reviews.title: Over rated. Over priced. Not recommended.
reviews.text: Big property, but requires huge and constant maintenance program. Pretty old and isolated. No services around it. No 24 hour room service. Transportation exraordinarily expensive.

reviews.title: An average hotel, nothing special
reviews.text: Just average hotel, not really worth to be ranked as a 5 star

reviews.title: Excellent Room but very bad service
reviews.text:
We spent 4 days 3 nights and were extremely happy and glad that we picked the Pool Villa, the room was very good and modern. The breakfast was excellent, with friendlly staff.

The room service, was very bad, it took them almost two hours to fix our wifi problem. Further problems with power sockets took them almost another two hours and five calls to fix. Also when about to leave they tried to stiff us with 11 mins long distance phone call, that was made at 11.57, five minutes after we left our room!

The beach was rocky and mudddy.
reviews.positives: Very Modern Room

reviews.title: Mosquitos mosquitos

reviews.positives: Nice complementary breakfast, friendly front desk.  Poor cleanliness and guest services.

reviews.title: 4 stars - not more
reviews.text: The hotel is more of a 4stars. It is not very well managed. Didn't see a manager on duty at all and everyone was doing what they want; they wouldn't leave shampoo etc for a few days. The food is average, the beach dirty and the hotel property is very strange split by the road on half. Value for money is ok but far not a 5 star resort.

reviews.title: Dated
reviews.text: This resort had everything breaking down. The jacuzzi didn't work. The safe was faulty. It felt that they didn't do a check before a check in. Beautiful in the jungle but it needed more work on it
reviews.response:
Thank you very much for your feedback. We are truly sorry to know that your experience didn’t match your expectations.
We do appreciate your comment and take note on this for the future improvement. We look forward to welcoming you again at Renaissance Koh Samui Resort & Spa, and will ensure that your next stay will be a memorable one.

reviews.title: Nice Quiet Location
reviews.text: We booked a Deluxe Sea View room and were surprised to be in the back building at least a 250 meter walk from the beach across a small public road (or bridge). We had a thumbnails view of blue which was the sea. Not sure why we paid more for that. The buildings are nice but expect to do a lot of walking to restaurants, breakfast and the beach. Its a classic wide open walk way Asian Hotel with a nice blend of timber and stone. The room was big, comfortable bed and largish bathroom. We had a nice short stay but won't stay there again. There are a lot of other nicer choices in the same or better price range.
reviews.positives: Large Pool, Nice Room, Good Breakfast

reviews.title: quiet vacation

reviews.text: We stayed for three nights and enjoy their excellent customer service but hotel is far from main beaches and needs to get scooter to get around, but we don't mind.  The price is high but breakfast was delicious.
reviews.positives: Excellent service

reviews.title: family trip
reviews.text: the villa is big, but the hotel is old, the breakfast is very good

reviews.title: Overrated and disappointing
reviews.text: They have a serious mosquito infestation problem. Our patches were useless against the lethal mosquitoes. One would have expected the hotel to take better measures given the rainy season, but no. On the bright side, staff performance was on the whole warm and friendly except for one exceedingly rude and surly chamber maid. And the hot/cold water mixer in the bathroom needs to be fixed/improved.

reviews.title: It was general a good stay except for check in
reviews.text: No serious problem but annoying that the check in staff continue to try and charge more for an extra person and was persistent and final he called the manager ( supposedly) and then manager approved but no breakfast for the extra person.   As a member of the Marriott for a long time, I did not feel there were any special welcoming or treatment as a member.  After the unpleasant argument during the check in, everything else was fine.
reviews.positives: quiet, good swimming pool and staff in general good service

reviews.title: quiet and lovely garden view pool villa
reviews.text: overall it was perfect. i love the pool villa and its very quiet. great for relaxation couples. but very lousy food at TawaNN and even the breakfast.
reviews.positives: beautiful landscape, nice room, friendly staff

reviews.title: comfortable due to complimentary upgrade
reviews.text: As they were overbooked with a (very noisy) Chinese tour group, we got a complimentary upgrade to a pool villa.  It was large, with high ceilings, and comfortable. The restaurants had limited menus and were quite small for such a large hotel.  But, even then, few guests used them.  There are lots of other restaurants in the area. Lamai is a sunrise beach with lots of broken coral and not suitable for swimming. We headed for the sunset side of the isand for better beaches each evening.
reviews.positives: on beach, attentive staff, relaxed

reviews.title: Nice but you can find better
reviews.text: Considering the fact that reinessance is a branch of Marriot hotels, it did not meet our expectations. Rooms were small, although we were given the top floor of their 6 story building , it was quite far from the water and you needed to cross a bridge to get to the main hotel area. Additionally it felt like more of a city style hotel with several brick themed buildings connected together rather then a tropical resort. I would recommend it if you needed a place to stay while conducting business but there are better places to stay when it comes to experiencing thailand and vacationing on your honeymoon or just relaxing to the ocean breeze.
reviews.positives: Location was good

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: We enjoyed our stay.

We look forward to welcoming you back to our resort soon and ensuring that your next stay at the Renaissance Koh Samui Resort & Spa will be an unforgettable experience. RenSamui Team

reviews.title: Staff needs communication & behavioral training
reviews.text:
We wanted to try the property and stayed for a night. I will be candid and say, did not have a great experience.
Positives: great location, clean beach, good food seection and minutes away from market or party world.
Opportunities: 1. Inroom service communication has to be improved. We had to call 3 times to get it right with initial response from the resturant that we did not place any order; 2. Staff seems to be very arrogant on the success or hotel rating, please be aware there are other 5+ star properties if we are paying that amount; 3. Staff needs to provide accurate information or simply say they dont know; 4. When you see your guest with infant what you can do at the least is be professional and not show your attitude, we are not staying free; 5. Please make sure electric systems and other equipments in the room is in good condition, no one likes to call for help mins after you checking; 5. Kids pool should be for kids and not for adults and smoking.

reviews.title: Standard room is Far from the beach
reviews.text:
The pool is amazing but very far from the room also the beach. Everything is very expensive and they add to the charges  17% 
We were disappointed and left after one day

reviews.title: Ok but...
reviews.text: Hi we spent there 5 nights.. all would be good but.. we preliminary booked DeluXe Room looking great on pics but in reality it was in big building far from all amenities and beach..The beach in the hotel area was not perfect, when walking couple meters more - really dirty .. The hotel is a bit in the middle of nowhere so if you want to eat something outside the hotel you have to basically take taxi and drive min 15 mins.. hmm so overall opinion is just so so...

reviews.title: Nice Hotel and great staff
reviews.text: Unusually the hotel has a beach which is accessible during high tide, many other 5* hotels build right up to the sea. Also there is a natural breakwater about 500m out to sea and so the waves gently lap at the shore making it safe for kids. The staff were lovely and polite throughout our 3 day stay, and a particular mention to Loy who looked after us at the sumptuous breakfast. The hotel is set back from the main road by about 1/2km but it is in the flight path to the airport (although not too distracting). The 'Deluxe' room was not deluxe by any normal 5* standard, just a normal room and these rooms are set way back from the main hotel and beach.
reviews.positives: Beach, Staff & Ambience

reviews.title: Good Food
reviews.text:
Great !
Badly Positioned A/C in the Room which blows directly to the Head.
reviews.positives: Food, Garden, Nice Swimming Pool

reviews.title: Disappointing stay
reviews.text: My husband and I stayed at the Reinassance in ko samui  during  our honeymoon. We travelled from north to south in Thailand and we' ve had some great experiences with other luxury and not luxury accommodations  but we cannot say the same for this resort. We booked a deluxe room with ocean view  because we didn' t want to be surrounded by walls as in a villa room. The deluxe rooms are  in a building across the street from the reception ,further away from the beach and the ocean view was almost completely obstructed by trees (we were at the 4th, maybe on the 5th or 6th it was better). This building it' s ten minutes walk from the beach/pool.  We like to walk but the path felt boring. The room was clean and we had a jacuzzi tub on our balcony that make our stay more special. The service was good (not great) everyone was nice and welcoming. The transfer from the airport that they offer to you it ' s expensive, we took a minibus from the airport at 350 bath for two and to come back we called a taxi that we paid 500 bath.The HIGHLIGHTS of this  resort were  the infinity pool (beautiful area), the lap pool, and the BBQ buffet on the beach they organize once a week, we recommend to reserve it because it is worth. The location of the resort, offering a lovely view of lamai beach . The nice welcome at the check- in with mango ice cream and cold towel to refresh. THE AVERAGE things was the breakfast, they offer fresh eggs to make but the pastry and the bread were average. We expected more from a 5 stars Resort, based on our previous experiences. We had a dinner at Banana leaf, Ok food,  but expensive.THE POOR: The beach is very small, the sand is not soft (small rocks and broken seashells), and the water too shallow to get into (knee deep). Elsewhere in ko samui the water is beautiful. We ended up using their free transfer (very efficient)  to the beautiful Chaweng and Lamai beaches and enjoyed the ocean. Go elsewhere if you like to be in the oceean
reviews.positives: lap pool, infinity pool, beach barbecue

reviews.title: Past its 'best by' date
reviews.text:
2 great things stand out about this hotel: it has the feeling of the tropical jungle on a private cove with a lovely sand beach. The 'lap pool' located by the Deluxe rooms is quiet and beautiful for a tranquil swim.
Other than those, the rooms are old and not well designed- dark and cramped. The staff communication ranges from inaccurate to snarky, though a few try to be accommodating. The spa is awkwardly laid out with low skilled therapists. The food is average and overpriced. Fortunately the happy hour cocktails are good. 
With all the great resorts in Thailand, one could happily give this one a miss.
reviews.response:
Thank you very much for your great feedback. It’s our pleasure to have you at Renaissance Koh Samui Resort & Spa and knowing that you had a fantastic stay with us.
We look forward to welcoming you again soon at our resort, and will make sure that your next stay at Renaissance Koh Samui Resort & Spa will be a memorable one.

However, the staff members are all cheerful. We are well received by your intern Kristiana from Latvia.

The stay could have been a lot better if it's not because of the jacuzzi and the hot water problem.

We like to hang out at the pool area or take walks along the private beach. The breakfast spread was superb and wide range of food catering to the whole family. reviews.title: Overall great, great food! Amazing restaurant manager, thanks to him. Generally amazing personel.

reviews.negatives: Once we wanted to go for a national park trip one person from the front desk made us to change our tour to an expensive one (where he claims hotel works with them) by telling that the other tours are bad, no guarantee kind of cliches. He made us to pay more than 1500 bahts difference to his recommended tour operator. After attending it we learned that all the tours are same in services. Once you visit such a country in such an established hotel chain, you expect your hotel, and its personel to always help and find you the best alternatives and deals for you. Its not good even think that you have paid more for somebody to get some percentage. I have same feeling with car rental, since i didnt double check the prices around i can not say that he made us to pay more, but unfortunately i have the same feeling and i cant do any thing about it.

reviews.title: Romantic Renaissance
reviews.text:
Renaissance Hotel is a fabulous boutique style romantic resort just outside of Lamai. 
There are two in house restaurants The banana Leaf and Tawaan. Tawaan ,which means Sun in Thai, is the better.
The hotel staff and manager are very helpful and friendly.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: We thoroughly enjoyed our stay at Renaissance Resort but would warn elderly people with mobility problems about the number of steps to get to the beach . Also isolated from bars restaurants to walk to . There was a distinct shortage of bars for a hotel of this size. Food and drinks were good but overpriced.

reviews.title: Overrated Hotel
reviews.text: Property is divided into 2 parts separated by public road. Deluxe/Sea view deluxe rooms are other side of the main property. Sea view is also quite obstructed. Garden Villa having private pool have no privacy as the pool is visible from the other Villa. Choice of vegetarian food is limited. Property is beautiful and staff is courteous. Property is accessed by a pot holed service road patch of roughly 3/4 kms. off the the main road. Complimentary shuttle service timings to Lamai &Chewang beachare quite in convenient.

reviews.title: Good but we expected better
reviews.text: The staff is very friendly and the location is top. However, we expected a more luxurious facility and we had several issues with our room. It is a good value for the money.

Prices are reasonable compared with other large developments. The pool is a fun place to be and it has the buzz due to the higher take-up amongst tourists. yet, it is not that overcrowded. The breakfast is a treat. What we get is quality - eg. the fruit juices are squeezed on the spot and the variety is plentiful. It is also a fruits galore with local fruits in addition to the usual fare . Its quality

reviews.title: Marritt Renaissance
reviews.text: Renaissance ,previously known as The Buriraya, is now part of the Marriott group of hotels. This means there are very good staff and hotel managers etc..however Marriott have not spent any money updating this hotel since i last stayed here 5 years ago!Overall good value for money but no complimentary Wi-Fi and no Kids club means we probably wont be back. This style of hotel is known as Boutique and all its nearby competitors have Wi-Fi.
reviews.positives: The Marriott Renaissance is overall a fab hotel. We stayed in a villa looking out towards the main swimming pool and the ocean. We had our own plunge pool and private patio/garden . The staff are very helpful and friendly. I recommend the private garden bar-b -q.
reviews.negatives: As in most marriott hotels there is no complimentary internet, which is a little mean when you are paying the published room rate of 12-13000 baht a night. Also there is no childrens club unlike most marriotts. The tvs in the rooms are not flat screen which means they take up alot of room. But on the whole the rooms are very nice although a little tired.

reviews.title: The stay was great
reviews.text: It was pleasant. But quite far from the main town
reviews.positives: Quite private beach

reviews.title: Above expectation
reviews.text:
Pros - Poolside provide free movie night, cocktail, Kayak & surf board, thoughtful to supply free sun block lotion and beach shoes. 

Breakfast has different “Special of the day” menu daily.  Ambassadors Max and a Caucasian lady service were fantastic. 


Cons - The biggest drawback was to walk out the 400m from the hotel to the main road on sunny and rainy day was a huge challenge. Sunny day will be scorching and rainy day a 100m length of the road will be flooded. Can consider to provide hourly songthaew shuttle service between hotel lobby and the main road.

During one of the breakfast session, a couple of local staff were busy chatting and laughing at the main door area. Flies spotted on fruits & foods.

My daughter was scared of a female poolside staff who stared at her when she accidentally spilled water on the opening concrete bricks. So we have a hard time persuading her to the poolside for the following stay onwards.

For room, the only fault was the bath tub stopper wasn’t working. Highlighted on my first day of stay but nothing was done ever till I checked out.

reviews.title: Great small resort, fantastic service
reviews.text: Stayed in deluxe room in main block, upgraded to sea view due to Marriott Platinum status! Also received selection of snacks and drinks. Room not immediately available due to busy season and delay in housekeeping, so they comped a round of drinks at the pool bar. Room was clean and reasonably well maintained with exception of some damage to wood floor near bathroom area. invited to GM cocktails one night, a very nice touch and good chance to chat with staff and other guests. All round, a top quality 4+ star experience. Location is away from main drag at Chaweng (I consider this a positive), but it does mean you have to rent a motorbike (200b per day) or deal with.

reviews.title: Amazing Villa Stay
reviews.text:
Stayed in a pool villa with my family (with 2 children) for 3 nights. I am a platinum member of Marriott Rewards, and I was given an additional roll-away bed with no additional cost, welcome ice-creams during check-in, welcome fruits and cookies in the room and complimentary wifi. Hotel staffs were very friendly and helpful. 

Location of the resort was a little hidden, access from main road could be missed easily if you come from Chaweng direction. We followed a small truck road from main road and passed by some local residential houses before arriving at the resort. They provide free shuttle bus service to Chaweng and Central Festival shopping mall. But for convenience, I rented a car to enable more freedom in time management.

The spa pool in the villa was great for bonding moments with my wife and kids in the afternoon. The sofa in the room was good to be converted as another bed for a child, so the villa was simply perfect for 2 adults and 2 children. We were also briefed by a friendly hotel staff about the villa and the resort upon arrival at our villa. Wifi speed was good, but satelite TV channels were limited.

Breakfast was good. There were 2 huge pools @ the resort, recommended to use the beach facing pool as the sea view was fantastic. The other pool was the long lap pool with the length of olympic swimming pool but it was located far from villas and quieter. The resort has its private beach. However, the beach did not meet my expectation, the sea water level at that area was too low for a swim. It feels like being always at low tide.

reviews.title: Lovely, peaceful place
reviews.text: Great stay. Staff was lovely and super friendly. Lap pool is great and we had a fantastic view from our room. Its a bit secluded, but we liked that.

reviews.title: Enjoyed the stay
reviews.text: A

reviews.title: A smashing hotel with outstanding staff
reviews.text:
We spent a total of 9 nights at the Marriott Renaissance Samui.

Khun Nong, the reservation supervisor, assisted us via email with some questions and queries we had prior to our arrival. She was always quick, efficient and very helpful.

Upon check-in we were greeted by the reception staff and very well taken care of. The first impression did not leave any room for doubts, if we had booked the right hotel for our holiday.

We spent the first couple of days exploring the premises and meeting the staff, lazing around the pool and beach areas.

Housekeeping had done an amazing job secretly decorating our room for my partners bday. They had blown up all balloons (30 in total, I felt somewhat sorry for the housekeeping team) and hung them nicely all over the room, spread all the other decorations throughout the room.

That surprise was followed by a smashing birthday dinner at the beach front (it was the beach BBQ evening). A table in the first row had been reserved for us and to our surprise after the meal, the waiters and waitresses gathered and surprised us with a birthday cake and sang happy birthday. Khun Woody is a real character and made us laugh a lot during the dinner. These kind of characters really make a difference and stick in people´s memories.

Another outstanding staff member I would like to point out is Ken. He was always around when needed. He is a total pro at what he does and went out of his way to assist us anytime, anywhere in any which way. He was always available, always present and always working hard. Simply a great chap you feel you can approach at any time with any questions or queries.

We had had a look at the pool villas just after checking in and then decided, after 4 nights in the deluxe rooms, to upgrade to the aforementioned. We were very impressed we were with the villa. Spacious, private and designed in a lovely contemporary Thai style.

We drive to chaweng everyday cuz the location of Renaissance is poor which is the only bad thing I can memorize. I can still remember that the first day the resort hold a cocktail and BBQ party beachfront and we happily attend it. The last day we order a shuttle to the airport cost 1000B which is not too expensive. The stuff can speak good english and there's even a Chinese intern. Our villa No.123 and No.124 smell great like lemongrass and the stuffs all friendly with bright smile.

The staff is great. Very friendly, we really enjoyed the service. 

Although the breakfast is excellent, food at lunch/dinner time is not what you would expect for a Thai restaurant in a 5 star hotel and for this price. We were very disappointed. 

Another thing, if you are member of Marriott Rewards, tell it upfront when you check in as you will have free wifi in room, otherwise it's 5£/day. We have stayed in 5 hotels during our stay in Thailand and it's the only one which doesn't propose free wifi in room. This is very surprising and not in a good way. So if you are not member of Marriott Reward, subscribe before you stay. 

It was my second stay there, 1st time was 7 years ago and I would definitely go a 3rd time.

What really made a fantastic holiday for my wife, was the interaction between staff and guests. We were treated as family .
Chef Tor runs the kitchen to an exemplary standard, and will provide custom meals if required. My wife has a nut allergy. Nothing to worry about at this hotel. Excellent advice given and custom meals cooked.  Do not miss the complimentary Bloody Marys at breakfast!
Also, Korn, and colleagues opened a bar at 03:00 so guests could watch World Cup games. I can think of no downside to this hotel.
It is built on a hill, so persons with walking disabilities may find it a minor chore. In my view, well worth a visit.
We hope to return some time.

reviews.title: Child friendly resort right on the beach
reviews.text:
Stayed 6D5N at the Renaissance Samui (or #Rensamui as they call themselves). Our party consisted of 4 adults and 4 kids between 5-9 years old. We prefer swimming, chilling and the occasional sight seeing.

Positives:
Breakfast buffet great spread. Their Thai food is very good.
Restaurants very kid friendly with children's menu (visit Tawann for more Asian kid's dishes).
Two pools, one good for laps and the other fronting the beach.
Free use of kayak and paddle board (life jacket and sand shoes available)
Room size very decent
Staff extremely friendly and helpful (we organized a very customized day tour with their help. Wonderful to have a very flexible itinerary when you have picky kids...)
Some free in house activities available (yoga, towel folding, sand art etc)
Accessibility friendly although likely still challenging due to it being on a slope
Free shuttle out to the main road and also to Central Festival Market.

Negatives
Lots of stairs - they have lots of lifts and ramps but little legs get tired easily
Air-conditioning is either freezing or hot. We had it at 26°C - need an additional robe on until the temp stabilized.
Shower temperature is also erratic - there is a very fine sweet spot where the water will be warm. Our kids prefer less warm water and at that temperature, the shower will fluctuate between hot and cold. We kinda worked out which angle of the mixer tap works best by the end of our stay.
Whirlpool - we used it once and the water was light brownish... Not sure if it's representative of the municipal water. 

Despite the negatives, we thoroughly enjoyed our stay and are likely to return again.

RenSamui Team

reviews.title: Wonderful Stay in a Clean, Friendly Hotel
reviews.text: Absolutely wonderful stay at the Renaissance. From the moment we arrived we were taken care of. Very friendly staff always happy to help and offer recommendations of what's good to see and do around the island. Being vegetarian, Banana Leaf was a goto restaurant for food at the hotel. The Green Curry is absolutely delicious. The Chefs pay special attention to your dietary requirements and will modify pretty much any meal to suit your needs. The villa and pool with garden view was clean, well kept and relaxing to stay in. Be cautious at night as one of the bedroom lights is situated directed on top of the blades of the spinning fan causing an uncomfortable strobe light affect in the main seating area. We would just turn it off and stick with the air con to keep cool. The swimming pool is nice and large and there were always plenty of deck chairs to relax on. The beach is and water area are not the best on the island but then it's only a 15 minute drive to get to Chaweng Beach where the sea and sand are beautiful. All in all an absolutely wonderful stay and we certainly hope to return to the Renaissance soon.

reviews.title: Best resort on Koh Samui!
reviews.text:
Possibly best resort I've ever stayed! The hotel staff was amazing, attentive and super friendly.  Housekeeping welcomed us in the room with a cute handwritten welcome note and diligently kept the room refreshed a couple times per day. Food at each of the restaurants in the resort was incredible, with a diverse selection of dishes. Extra special shout out to the beach bar staff!! :)

The resort itself is beautifully designed and impeccably well maintained. The beach is quite good, compared to some other places on the island which can be very rocky. Between the restaurants, spa, and the beach, you could easily spend a week here and not be bored.

I can't recommend this place enough! Everyone working at this resort each really deserves a gold medal :). Will definitely come back to stay here again.

reviews.title: A Very Wonderful Experience
reviews.text:
Let's start with the breakfast. Really great. Definitely spend a little more and get a room that includes the breakfast!
The location of the resort is really nice and quiet. Lamai area is great if you don't want all the commotion of the "bigger" areas. My wife and I enjoyed this a lot. The private beach on the resort is nice and warm with plenty of room to swim around. We also suggest waking up early to walk around during low-tide. We saw some cool critters.
The staff is what makes the hotel great. LITERALLY ANYTHING we needed they would get us or arrange for us. Rent a scooter? They arranged it. Snorkel trip? They arranged it. Want to send a post card? Buy some stamps at the local family mart and give them to the front desk. 
Definitely a good value for the money. Highly suggest.
reviews.positives: Customer Service, The Amazing Breakfast, Location

reviews.title: Best hotel we have stayed at to date!
reviews.text:
this has got to be the best hotel we have stayed at!
we arrived early and was not able to check in but were greeted with ice-cream and was able to chill by the pool/beach while waiting for the room to be ready. we managed to get a massage by the beach too! 
staff were excellent who constantly looked after us during our 5 days 4 nights stay. 
we will definately be recommending this hotel to everyone who heads to koh samui!
reviews.positives: Service, spacious rooms, great events, lovely pool by the beach!

reviews.title: lovely hotel and service
reviews.text: we arrived quite late in the evening and were greeted with a smile. they also offered us a home made ice cream which was quite fantastic. the rooms were very spacious and well equipped. the breakfast layout is extensive and being vegatarian they prepared special pad thai noodles for us and also veg sandwiches. the pool is right on the beach and has a beautiful view. the hotel is located 5 kms from chaweng beach which is where all the action is. we had rented a car so it was only a 10 minute drive. koh samui is a small island and if you have a car you can cover the entire island in an hour. overall renaissance has a good and relaxing feel to it and very nice place to stay at koh samui
reviews.positives: the hotel has a very nice beach front location. also the layout is quite fantastic.

reviews.title: Perfect Location
reviews.text: We were upgraded to a Villa, the rooms were lovely, so clean and spacious with excellent facilities. I'd highly recommend staying in one of the villas, perfect for a romantic break, the resort offers a great view over Lamai, a relaxed and tranquil resort, excellent food and staff who are extremelly attentive and very very helpful. The villa cane with a private dip pool and courtyard, adding to the luxury and privacy that the rooms offered.

reviews.title: Oasis in Samui
reviews.text: Stayed at the Samui renaissance resort over valentines weekend ... it was the perfect gettaway. Was greated by the friendly staff at the resort whom escorted us to our more than ample room. Found everything there more than satisfactory. We ate at all the restaurants there and enjoyed the breakfast so much 5* all the way

reviews.title: Best valued hotel on Samui island
reviews.text: Free pick-up service from/to the airport, the hotel also provides free shuttle service to Chaweng area and the beach (in the other hotel we stayed, those shuttle services are NOT free). We stayed in 2 different hotels on Samui island and by comparison, Kirikayan is far better than the other hotel we stayed at. The room charge is reasonable, the staffs are very attentive, the apartment style guest room is unexpectedly large, the hotel itself is very new and very beautiful. Though the beach is on the other side of the hotel, it only takes about 3 minutes to the beach by hotel shuttle bus. The beach is amazingly beautiful, on a long stretched of coast line with soft sands and no rocks.
reviews.positives: Comfortable, very thoughtful customer service.

reviews.text: We hebben een heerlijk verblijf in Renaissance gehad. De kamers zijn heerlijk ruim en comfortabel. We hebben genoten van het bad op het balkon. Het ontbijt is luxieus. Er zijn 2 zwembaden, een om in te sporten en 1 om in te ontspannen. Het uitzicht op de zee is een plaatje (geen speedboten e.d.). De strandstoelen liggen heerlijk. Ik zou zo terug willen!

reviews.title: Top hotel
reviews.text:
Prachtig gelegen aan een klein, maar mooi strand. Doordat het een soort van lagune is, is de zee vrij ondiep en zonder golven. Prima om te poedelen en voor kinderen. 
Hotel is hier en daar wat gedateerd, maar alles wordt goed onderhouden en het is er bijzonder schoon. Kamers worden 2x per dag schoongemaakt en nagelopen. 
Het ontbijt is echt zeer uitgebreid en ook het eten in het restaurant is van goede kwaliteit.
Het personeel is zeer vriendelijk, correct en behulpzaam. 
We hebben er oud & nieuw gevierd. Dat was een spektakel van eten, drinken, muziek, optredens en groots vuurwerk op het strand. Echt geweldig gedaan. 
Wij kunnen dit hotel van harte aanbevelen, je zult er geen spijt van krijgen. 
Als wij nog eens op Koh Samui komen, dan wordt het zeker weer dit hotel.

reviews.title: 残念なホテルでした
reviews.text:
チェックインではウエルカムアイスクリームをサービスされますが、食べる猶予もまったくあたえられないまま、とにかく説明を早口でされました。マニュアル的な印象。オープンエアなので気温も高く、説明を聞いている間にどんどんアイスは溶けてしまいました。ぜんぜんウエルカムな空気を感じません
部屋は掃除が不十分で砂でじゃりじゃりしています。古いので仕方がない部分もあるのでしょうが、何もかもが壊れすぎです。せっかくのジャグジーも使用できず、ベランダの扉は立てつけが悪く非常に重くて開けるのも一苦労。閉めるのはもっと大変でした。修理を頼んでも一日目は一向に来ず、お風呂に入れませんでした。
ビルタイプの客室のほうに行くには屋根のない場所を通らないとどこにもいけません。雨が降ったのでどこに行くにもホテル内で傘を持参していく必要があります。もってなくて雨にぬれていてもスタッフは見て見ぬふりをしていました。
朝食は種類は豊富。味はまずまず。朝食込のプランを選択していても、値段の入ったレシートにサインをさせられる。何の説明もなく、不信感が募った。お金はとられなかったけど。お替わりをとりに席をたったら、テーブルを片付けられた。追い出されているような印象で非常に不愉快だった。
WiFiは300バーツ/dayと有料。ただし、無料のマリオットリワードに登録していれば、無料で使える。
ホテルの前のビーチは遠浅で岩だらけで泳ぐのには適していない。足のけがに注意する必要あり。
部屋の掃除を頼んでもなかなかこない。外出からかえっても朝のままで非常にげんなりした気分になった。
値段にみあったサービスは期待できない。いままで泊まったリゾートホテルで最低だった。
reviews.positives: 立派なプール。

reviews.title: そろそろリノベーション時期ですか
reviews.text: ちょっと古くなってきていますが、もともとの造りがしっかりとしているのでまだ大丈夫。　新しいホテルもばんばん出来ているので、場所的にもそんなに高額な部屋代は取れないでしょう。事前のメールには一切返信無しでした。　実務スタッフの人はタイらしく、笑顔で愛想は良いのですが、管理職、事務方の人はタイによくある、ちょっと勘違いをしている人が数人いました。お泊りになる方はプロモーションなどのお得な部屋代での宿泊をお勧めします。
reviews.positives: ロケーション

reviews.title: Renaissance Koh Samui
reviews.text: ホテルスタッフの教育は良く行きとどいているようで、非常に気持ちが良かった。　ビーチはこじんまりしていて、静かで心地よかった。ホテル前には２，３００メートルほどの遠浅があり、お湯と思うほど海水が温められており、泳ぐのには不向き。ホテル全体の雰囲気は非常に良かった。
reviews.positives: ホテルスタッフの対応が非常に良かった。　ビーチがきれい。
reviews.negatives: ホテルのレストランのサービスが遅かった。

reviews.title: 送迎手配にご用心！
reviews.text:
ホテル全体としては満足したのですが、まずはクレームも込めて短所から。Agodaでホテルを予約した場合、送迎手配は自分でするルールです（よね？）。このホテルは送迎付きプランで予約したのですが、手配をしようとMarriottoのサイトを見ると、各国のMarriottoの手配を自国でやりますということだったので、日本のMarriottoに電話。すると、Agodaなどの外部サイトをつかった予約はサポートしないとのこと！しかたなく、ホテル直通のメールアドレスを聞いて連絡したのですが、１週間たっても返信なし！仕方なく、日本のMarriottoにクレームしサポートを依頼したのですが、さらに３、４日くらい連絡なし！困り果てて再び日本のMarriottoに連絡したややっと返信が来たのですが、「送迎は有料」となっていて、あきれました。もうキャンセルしようと思ったくらい！日本のMarriottoがフォローしてくれたので、事なきを得ましたが、こんな対応になるんだったら、Agodaとかとの提携なんてしなきゃいいのに！と憤慨しました。本当に送迎がくるのか心配になっちゃいましたし、現地についてもお詫びもありませんでしたよ。みなさんもAgodaで送迎付きプランとか、自分で送迎手配する場合は、気をつけてくださいね。

出発前からこんないざこざはありましたが、ホテル自体はよかったです。いわゆるリゾートホテルなので白い砂浜で寝そべって読書やプールやらジムやらと過ごせました。

毎朝美味しい朝食を時間をかけて食べるのが幸せでした。パンはイマイチですが、タイ料理はオススメです。全体的に味がマイルドなのです！

我々は４ヶ月の赤ちゃんを連れて行ったのですが、現地ではベビーベッドを借りました。他にもベビーカーやベビーチェアもかりられるみたい。ヴィラにしたので、近所に気兼ねなく、家にいるような感じでリラックスできました！スタッフが赤ちゃんをあやしてくれたりして、ほんとよかったです。時期の問題（９月）かもしれませんが、日本人自体いなくて、子連れもいない。欧米人のお客さんはいい意味で無視してくれるので、子連れで気兼ねしちゃうわ～という人には、逆にオススメです。
reviews.positives: 朝食が美味しい！子連れの穴場？

reviews.title: お手頃
reviews.text: 新婚旅行で４泊しました。最初の日はアップグレードしていただき、ヴィラに泊まりました。部屋は想像以上によかったです。ただ道路の近くの部屋のため、うるさかったのが残念でした。食事やサービスは、超高級ホテルにもまさると劣らないくらいよかったです。最後の受付の男の人はなぜか態度が横柄でしたが。基本的には、非常に満足した滞在でした。
reviews.positives: 値段の割には、非常に高級感もありました。ホテルのディナーの食事は最高です。魚介類の料理は、いままで食べたなかでベストでした。もちろん朝食もよかったです。
reviews.negatives: 道路の近くで車の音がうるさいときがありました。ビーチも岩がおおいです。

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: 2泊で予約していたが、どちらも違う部屋になった。といってもUpgradeなので、良い部屋にしてもらった。どのスタッフも会えば挨拶をちゃんとしてくれ、気持ちがいい。朝食は美味しいが、品数は普通のレベル。部屋は新しくはないものの綺麗にしている。受付でお願いした事など、横の伝わりが無い？のか、別の人から確認されたりとそこはタイ人の性格と割り切ればよいのでは。

reviews.title: プールヴィラに泊まるなら最高
reviews.text:
小学校低学年の娘は、天蓋付のベッドとプライベートプールに狂喜乱舞。ほとんど一日中プールに入っていた。
ビーチはそこそこ。シュノーケリング派はかなり沖まで遠浅の海を進まないと楽しめるところはない。（途中で諦めた。）
コンビニは大通り沿いにあるが、10分くらい歩く。元気なうちに買いだめておく必要あり。
お風呂はお湯を溜めて入浴可能だが、溜めた水を抜くとその水圧で全ての排水溝から空気が逆流し部屋が臭くなった。（5分ほどで元に戻る）シャワーで済ませておいた方が無難。
ホテルでノンビリ派は基本的にホテル内で食事をすることになるが、プールサイドのバーで食べたフィッシュアンドチップス、ブルスケッタ盛り合わせがリーズナブルでおいしかった。チェックアウトした後、もう一度食べたくらい。
2泊くらいの週末をサムイで過ごすのならまた行くかも。

reviews.title: 雰囲気が非常に良い！！
reviews.positives: プライベートビーチ、近隣が静か、朝食がおいしい

reviews.title: リラックス出来ました
reviews.text: スタッフの対応が非常に良かった。さすが5つ星、教育がしっかりしているなと思う。おかげでリラックス出来ました。
reviews.positives: スタッフの対応、料理、充実した設備

reviews.title: スタッフの対応が最高！
reviews.positives: ・スタッフの対応・のんびりできるリゾート・朝食がおいしい

reviews.title: ヴィラがとても広く快適でした
reviews.text:
ガーデンプールヴィラで予約しましたが、アップグレードしてもらい海辺のプールヴィラに宿泊。ヴィラは広く清潔で快適に過ごせましたが、それ以上にプール越しに夕日が落ちていく景色に時間が流れるのを忘れるように魅入ってしまいました。ヴィラのプールは小さくて大人には使いにくいですが、子供たちはうれしそうに遊んでました。
海は遠浅でどこまで行っても足が着きます。透明度はそれ程期待できませんが、サムイ島ではどこも同様でしょう。プールは大きくはないですが、少し泳いだり子供と遊ぶには十分です。
朝食は非常に美味しかったですが、レストランが少し狭い感がありました。
総合的には満足度の高いホテルでした。
reviews.positives: 部屋から見る夕日が最高にきれいでした

reviews.title: レビュー
reviews.text:
1月の中旬に2泊しました。施設は清潔感があり、手入れが行き届いていて満足です。
本来はビルタイプのツインの部屋を予約していたのですが、無料アップグレードでプールビラになりました。ビラタイプはキングベッドであるため、相談したら無料でエクストラベッドを入れていただきました。
プールビラは共有プールや海へのアクセスも良く非常に快適でした。
反対にビルタイプの部屋は見ていないので様子は不明ですが、ホテルの敷地の端にあるため、プールや海、朝食のレストランなどへのアクセスが遠く面倒だろうなと思いました。

reviews.title: スタッフの対応は最高
reviews.text:
ラマイビラに宿泊。
Good points
ヴィラの真ん前がビーチ
部屋は清潔
風呂はタイル張りで写真では古びた悪い印象だったが、実は清潔でお湯を入れて子供と入浴した。全く問題なし。
スタッフの対応は最高。子供の乳製品アレルギーに対して対応いていただき、本当に感謝。毎日特別のパンまで用意して頂き、お昼にビーチでお願いしたパスタも乳製品を使用せず提供していただいた。食事の時はいつも声をかけていただいた。サラサムイの後にルネサンスに来た。サラサムイは新しくきれいだが、ルネサンスのスタッフには及ばない。夕方にチャウエンビーチとラマイビーチまでシャトルバスの送迎があり非常に便利だった。
reviews.positives: スタッフ

reviews.title: オフシーズンでしたが。
reviews.text:
ヴィラタイプの高級ホテルをオフシーズンということで半額で滞在することができました。確かに晴天はありませんでしたが、曇天なるがゆえに暑いことはなく、ホテルやレストラン、観光ポイントは人出が少なく全てスムーズに過ごすことができました。
ホテルは、宿泊客が少なかったこともあり、とても静かでカップルの滞在にはふさわしいでしょう。
　場所が繁華街から離れているので、街中の喧騒やウィンドウショッピングを楽しみたい人には移動が面倒かもしれません。
reviews.positives: スタッフが親切だったこと、レストランの料理は価格に比例しており上品で美味しい。ヴィラに泊まったが、独立性が高あく落ちつくことができた。

reviews.title: 快適なヴィラライフ
reviews.text:
ホテル敷地内は木々が多く、とてもリラックスできます。客室（ガーデンプールヴィラ宿泊）は、天井が高く高級感もあり、とても快適。プライベートプールから室内のシャワーに直接行けたり、洗面台がツイン、ソファーがとても快適など、さすが高級資本（マリオット系）リゾート。
ローシーズンということもあり、リーズナブルな宿泊料でリゾート感が満喫でき、とても満足。ただし、ホテル内のレストラ等は、ちょっと割高な印象。安くすませたい時は、ビーチ沿いの2件先にある「Uncle Rang Restaurant」がお勧めです。とてもカジュアルですが、ホテル内の半額以下でおいしく食事ができます。
なお、よく停電があり、停電時は発電機が稼働します。発電機はレセプション棟にあり、かなり大きな音がします。（夜に虫の声を聴きながら、プライベートプールでのんびりという時に、ゴーというディーゼル音はちょっと興ざめです。）気になる人はあらかじめ、レセプション棟から離れたヴィラをリクエストするほうが良いかもしれません。
reviews.positives: 高級かつ快適な客室

reviews.title: いい思い出ができました
reviews.text:
友達３人で滞在しました。
サムイ島は初めてでしたが、ホテルの中ではゆっくり過ごせ、とても有意義な時間を楽しめました。
従業員の方々も笑顔で、気軽に声をかけて下さり、またプールサイドや、ビーチサイドは快適でした。
happy hourがもう少し早い時間であるとありがたかったです。
ホテルの中だけでも、満喫できる造りだと思います。ホテル内のスパも色んなメニューがあり、時間があれば、もっと受けてみたかったです。
サムイ島に、ホテルライフの快適さも求めるならば、ぜひおすすめです。チャウエンビーチ沿いよりもある意味、ゆっくりできるし、リゾートを満喫できるのではと思います。
大満足の旅行になりました。
reviews.positives: とってもゆっくりできて、朝食のビュッフェがとても美味しかった。

reviews.title: かなりいいホテルです
reviews.text:
スタッフは新設丁寧、プールバーもかなりいごごちよく価格もホテルにしては安かったです。また、部屋の外のプール、部屋も広く、綺麗で快適でした。
値段も手ごろのためかなりおすすめです。

ただ、ロケーション的に町遊びには向いていないため（タクシー台も高い）、せっかくなのでホテルでゆっくり過ごすのがいいのかと思います。
reviews.positives: 景色、部屋の広さ

reviews.title: スタッフの方はいつも笑顔です
reviews.text: オーシャンビュープール付きヴィラに泊まりましたが値段以上の価値あり。朝食のメニューも豊富で毎朝楽しみでした！スタッフの方はいつも笑顔で待遇も良く、子どもにとても優しくしてくれました。とても静かなロケーションなのでゆっくりするにはもってこいです。
reviews.positives: 朝食が種類が豊富で美味しかった

reviews.title: 居心地がいいホテル
reviews.text:
スタッフの方がとてもフレンドリーでした。
また、お部屋も奇麗でした。Villaを選ぶとお部屋一つ一つに小さなプールがついてます。
reviews.positives: 静かにすごせる空間

reviews.title: 施設と手入れ状態、スタッフ最高。アクセスは普通。英語ダメな人は厳しい。
reviews.text:
施設の設計、その手入れなどは非常に念が入っていて、快適に滞在した。
スタッフもホスピタリティがあり、いいホテルと感じた。
ただし、ヤモリは一杯いる。ヤモリのいないホテルってのは、たぶんサムイ島にはない。でも、部屋の中にはいなかった。運がいいだけかも。

アクセスは、この島のホテルはどこも似たか寄ったかだと思うけれど、バイクか車を借りないと簡単ではない。このホテルに限ったことではないので普通。
ロケーションとしては喧騒を離れた絶妙の位置にあり、リゾートしてるなぁって感じるのですばらしい。

朝食は、８：２で西洋風：タイ風のビュッフェスタイル。味は悪くない。信頼できる生野菜、生フルーツをいっぱい食べられるのがうれしい。

日本語をしゃべれるスタッフは私の知る限りいない。日本語表記の説明もない。片言英語を理解しようと勤めるスタッフはがんばっていたが、それでも英単語連発英語では意思疎通は難しく、まったく英語ダメな人にはお勧めしない。
でも、日本人客が多いから、15分ほどフロントで困ってれば誰か通りかかるかも？
reviews.positives: 施設、手入れの状態などはほぼ完璧。

reviews.title: 素敵なホテル
reviews.text: 部屋のセンスや家具のとてもおちついていて、とてもナイスでした。プールは50メートルの長いプールがとても印象的で楽しく泳ぐ練習には最適です。像もたくさんあり、みていてたのしませていただきました。また行きたいです。
reviews.positives: プールがすばらしい。

reviews.title: ห้องดูเก่า เหมือนไม่ค่อยมีคนใช้งาน เจอแมลงสาบตัวเล็กตายในอ่างอาบน้ำ ถนนขรุขระมาก อาหารเช้าธรรมดา
reviews.text: แต่พนักงานบริการดีอยู่จ้า โดยรวมบายจ้า
reviews.response:
Thank you very much for your feedback. We are truly sorry to know that your experience didn’t match your expectations.
We do appreciate your comment and take note on this for the future improvement. We look forward to welcoming you again at Renaissance Koh Samui Resort & Spa, and will ensure that your next stay will be a memorable one.
reviews.room_type: 1 Bedroom Villa, 1 King, Sofa bed, Private pool, Whirlpool

reviews.title: ห้องพักดี แต่ไม่มี wifi ให้ใช้ถ้าไม่ได้เป็นสมาชิก
reviews.text: ห้องพักดี กว้างขวาง ของใช้ครบถ้วน พนักงานทุกคนบริการดี ยิ้มแย้ม เงียบสงบดี ทักทายทุกคนที่เดินผ่าน แต่สิ่งที่ไม่ดีเลยคือ ไม่เปิด wifi ในกรณีที่ไม่ได้เป้นสมาชิกของเครือ มารีออต ทั้งๆ ที่จ่ายค่าห้องในระดับนี้ ห้องอาหารทานอาหารเช้า อาหารมีให้เลือกน้อย ที่สำคัญแมลงวันเยอะมาก ตอมอาหาร ดูแล้วน่าอ๊วก อายนักท่องเที่ยว กินไปปัดแมลงวันไป
reviews.positives: ห้องพักกว้าง สวย วิวดี พนักงานยิ้มแย้ม ต้อนรับดี

reviews.title: ประทับใจในการบริการ บรรยากาศดี เหมาะแก่การพักผ่อน
โรงแรมสวย บริการดี อาหารอร่อย
reviews.text:
โรงแรมสวย บรรยากาศดี พนักงานให้การต้อนรับดีมาก
อาหารเช้ามีให้เลือกหลากาลหลาย และรสชาติดี
วิวทะเลสวย แต่หาดไม่ค่อยน่าลงเล่นน้ำเท่าไร
reviews.positives: วิวสวย อาหารดี ห้องพักใหญ่

reviews.title: Good clean room , beautyful beach
reviews.text:
ห้องมีขนาดมาตรฐาน ได้รับ Upgraded เป็น Sea View Deluxe .เห็นทะเล (ชั้น 4) 
ห้องมีขนาดใหญ่ สะอาด มาตรฐานดี
สามารถแช่อ่าง ชมวิวทะเล, น้ำไหลแรง,
เตียงมีขนาดใหญ่ แอร์ เครื่องใช้สมตามมาตรฐาน

แต่ตึก Deluxe จะห่างจะทะเล ต้องเดินข้ามตึกมา ผ่านสวน ระยะทางไกล หากจะมาชายทะเล

การตกแต่งเป็นทรงไม้ ลายไทย โทนสีน้ำตาล ดำ  ไฟแสงสว่างสีเหลือง 

หากต้องมา Wheel chair มีทางลาด Lift, 
ห้องอาหารขนาดเล็กไปสักหน่อย รสชาติอาหารตามมาตรฐาน , ชายหาดสวยงามเล่นน้ำได้ ,สระมีขนาดเล็ก แต่มีกิจกรรมทางน้ำ เช่น พายเรือ 

หากนอน Pool Villa ควรนอน Beach front เพราะโซนอื่นจะให้ความรู้สึก อยู่ในสวน มองไม่เห็นทะเล..กำแพงปิดทึบ

การบริการถือว่า มาตรฐาน 5 ดาว
reviews.response:
Thank you very much for your great feedback. It’s our pleasure to have you at Renaissance Koh Samui Resort & Spa and knowing that you had a fantastic stay with us.
We look forward to welcoming you again soon at our resort, and will make sure that your next stay at Renaissance Koh Samui Resort & Spa will be a memorable one.

reviews.title: รีสอทแห่งความสงบ
reviews.text: โรงแรมสวยและสงบเงียบ อาจจะเพราะเรามาพักในช่วงวันธรรมดาแต่ก็ถือเป็นรางวัลของวันหยุดเพราะรีสอทแทบจะเป็นของเรา พนักงานน่ารักมากกกก ดีใจกับทางผู้บริหารที่มีทีมงานดีขนาดนี้

reviews.title: บรรยากาศกี คุ้มราคา
reviews.text: รู้สึกมีความสุขและได้ผ่อนคลายตลอดระยะเวลาที่เข้าพัก
reviews.positives: บรรยากาศ การบริการ ความสวยงาม

reviews.title: ประทับใจสุดๆครับ
reviews.text: ห้องพักดีมาก สะอาด พนักงานนี่คือที่สุดครับทุกคนเลย มีโอกาสไปพักอีกแน่นอนครับ
reviews.room_type: Oceanview Pool Villa, 1 Bedroom Villa, 1 King, Sofa bed, Private pool, Whirlpool

reviews.title: โรงแรมสวย สะอาด การบริการดีเยี่ยม
reviews.text: เป็นครั้งแรกที่มาพักโรงแรมในแบรนด์ Renaissance โดยใช้สิทธิ์โครงการเราเที่ยวด้วยกันในครั้งนี้ จองห้องพักแบบพูลวิลล่า หลังใหญ่มาก สบายมาก มีความเป็นส่วนตัวสุดๆ แถมมีบริการนวดฟรีให้คนละ 60 นาทีด้วย พนักงานทุกคนยิ้มแย้มแจ่มใส ให้การต้อนรับและดูแลเอาใจใส่ดีทุกคน อาหารเช้าอร่อยมี 2 แบบ ทั้ง Buffet & A La Carte ส่วนมื้อค่ำก็ใช้บริการที่ห้องอาหารของโรงแรม อร่อยและราคาไม่แพง เสียดายไปพักแค่คืนเดียว แต่ถ้ามีโอกาสอยากจะกลับไปพักที่โรงแรมนี้อีกหลายๆ คืนค่ะ
reviews.response:
Thank you very much for your great feedback. It’s our pleasure to have you at Renaissance Koh Samui Resort & Spa and knowing that you had a fantastic stay with us.
We look forward to welcoming you again soon at our resort, and will make sure that your next stay at Renaissance Koh Samui Resort & Spa will be a memorable one.
reviews.room_type: 1 Bedroom Villa, 1 King, Sofa bed, Private pool, Whirlpool

reviews.title: โรงแรมสวย กว้างขวาง
reviews.text: อาหารเช้ามีให้เลือกหลายอย่าง พนง.น่ารัก บริการดี welcome icecream อร่อยมากกก

reviews.title: โรงแรมสวย เงียบสงบ เหมาะแก่การพักผ่อน
reviews.text: รู้สึกว่าได้พักผ่อนจริงๆ  บริการดีมาก เอาใจใส่ตลอด
reviews.positives:
บรรยากาศ
บริการ
อาหาร

reviews.title: มีความสะดวกสบาย พนักงานโรงแรมต้อนรับดี. และบริการด
reviews.text: สนุกมาก พนักงานทุกคน ดูแล ต้อนรับดี ทุกฝ่าย ยกเว้น สปา นั้น 50 /50 อย่างอื่น. สมบรูณ์แบบ. อาหารเช้าอร่อย หอ้งพักได้หอ้งที่ถูกใจมาก. มากับครอบครัวและเด็กเล็กรู้สึก. เป็นสว่นตัวและอบอุ่นอยากกลับไปพักอีก. โลเคชั่น ดีมาก หาดทราย สว่นตัวสะอาด และน้ำทะเล ใส สวยมาก. หอ้งพักมี จากกู้ดชี่พูล. สำหรับเด็กๆเล่นน้ำได้. ชอบมาก
reviews.positives: อาหาร บริการ โลเคชั่น

reviews.title: 細心週到
reviews.text: 很美好的旅程。房間很舒服，還有按摩池！
reviews.positives: 私人海灘寧靜好美麗，泳池有浮床玩沙玩具，水鞋救生衣，還有防曬用品。多細心。員工服務親切友善。位置有點不方便，但酒店一日有兩班免費巴士到査汶和拉邁中心。

reviews.title: 用心了解客人需要
reviews.text: 大致上非常滿意，但跟房務員工溝通有困難，未能即時滿足要求。因為酒店位置較偏遠，如shuttle bus service能加密更好
reviews.positives: 餐飲員工及經理主動了解客人意見，用心聆聽要求。員工親切友善。接待處介紹酒店詳盡

reviews.title: Perfect honeymoon in Lamai
reviews.positives:
We stayed at this beautiful luxury hotel in Thailand for a few days during our second honeymoon, and it truly exceeded our expectations. From the moment we arrived, the staff were exceptional—warm, attentive, and genuinely caring. They made us feel very special and went above and beyond to ensure every detail of our stay was perfect.

The food at the hotel was excellent, and dinner in particular was outstanding, with a wide variety of high-quality options. While the overall experience is quite expensive compared to typical Thailand prices, it is absolutely worth it for the level of service, comfort, and luxury you receive.

Our room was spotless, flawless, and extremely comfortable. Housekeeping was impeccable, and everything felt fresh, clean, and very well maintained throughout our stay. It was the perfect place to relax and enjoy our time together.

Overall, this hotel offers an exceptional combination of luxury, comfort, and outstanding service. It’s an ideal choice for couples, honeymoons, or anyone looking for a special and memorable stay. We would happily return and highly recommend it.
reviews.negatives: The hotel is quite distant from restaurants and shops, more secluded, so our explorations were limited to cab rides.

reviews.title: good hotel
reviews.text:
本人選擇入住 renaissance koh samui resort & spa，住完後覺得這個選擇真的是沒有錯。當初選擇這間酒店的原因是只是因為鄰近我需要工作地方，但萬萬沒有想隨該酒店的服務是如此良好。 
  
 renaissance koh samui resort & spa鄰近市區，但景觀十分開揚；另外，酒店外觀與網站上所列視的圖片是一樣的，見到後，就已經覺得我當初的選擇一定沒有錯。當我提著行李箱進入酒店大 堂，各個職員均以真摰的笑容歡迎我，令我有一種回到了家的感覺，每每出外工作或遊玩時，總喜歡把榻下的酒店稱為「家」，因為有了家才有舒服的感覺；而 renaissance koh samui resort & spa正正符合了我這個要求。累了就想回家，而這個家就是 renaissance koh samui resort & spa，因為它帶給了我「家」的感覺。

環境衛生往往都是旅客的必要條件，當然我也不例外，我對衛生的條件是十分重視的，不能有異味，不能有小昆蟲出現，不能骯髒等。 renaissance koh samui resort & spa能達到，而且令我非常滿意
  
經過今次的住宿體驗後,令我喜歡上了這間酒店，有機會一定會再度入住，另外房間裡的床給了我舒適的睡眠，雖然今次出外也是有些許不習慣，但是我能安心入眠，這樣令我的身體及精神能 夠得以放鬆，亦令我減少了很多平日上積累已久的煩惱，能夠得此舒暢的心境，也是多得 renaissance koh samui resort & spa。 
    
最後，要退房的時間，酒店人員都很樂意回答我的提問，而且他們亦很開心我對於他們服務的支持。我是十分推薦這間酒店給任何人士，無論你是自己出外，結伴出外；是遊玩或公幹， renaissance koh samui resort & spa也是你的選擇。
reviews.positives: good service

reviews.title: Calm and serene.
reviews.positives:
The room - private pool with a beach view - was well worth the splurge. A nice spot for people who prefer total privacy while dipping in pool. The room was well maintained and always clean. The view was unbeatable even at night. Easy access to beach as well.

The property had options to rent bikes or cars with not much of a rate difference from outside places (this according to google search, not enquired in person) and staff where always helpful with suggestions about places to visit or food to try out.

The inclusive breakfast had both Thai options as well as regular ones like cereals, bread etc. Good profile taste wise.

All in all would suggest the property for a calm and relaxing stay.

reviews.title: 寜靜的高檔酒店
reviews.text:
SPA 的房間有點舊，應需維修
歺㕔的選擇較少
另外可讚是在那麼多樹木包圍下沒有太多昆蟲騷擾！
reviews.positives: 員工有禮，環境舒適，私人沙灘很幽靜給人很relax 的感覺！

reviews.title: A Slice of Paradise
reviews.positives:
Renaissance Koh Samui Resort is truly a place I call Paradise. From the moment we arrived, we were captivated by the stunning natural beauty that surrounds the resort, combined with the warmth and hospitality of the people who work there. This is a place where every detail is thoughtfully considered, making for an unforgettable experience.

The resort itself is breathtakingly beautiful, with lush gardens, crystal-clear waters, and views that truly take your breath away. The atmosphere is serene and peaceful, making it the perfect place to unwind and escape the hustle and bustle of everyday life.

A special thank you to Jennie and Ben Ben, two outstanding young professionals who went above and beyond to make our stay an amazing experience. Their dedication and attention to detail were evident in every interaction, and they made us feel truly welcomed and cared for.

The food at the resort is exceptional, with a wide variety of delicious options that cater to all tastes. Breakfast is plentiful and diverse, featuring everything from fresh fruits and pastries to a Bloody Mary bar—yes, even a Bloody Mary for breakfast! The atmosphere during meals is relaxed and enjoyable, perfect for starting or ending your day.

The resort also offers a free shuttle bus service to Lamai and Chaweng twice a day, which is a great convenience. While the return times from Chaweng are a bit early, it’s still a fantastic service that makes exploring the local area easy and stress-free.

The activities and events organized by the resort are another highlight. Whether it’s the free happy hour on the beach or the various events throughout the week, there’s always something fun and engaging to do. These thoughtful touches are what make the Renaissance Koh Samui Resort stand out as a truly exceptional place to stay.

In summary, Renaissance Koh Samui Resort is absolutely amazing—a place where nature, luxury, and impeccable service come together to create an unforgettable experience.

reviews.title: 令人休閒放鬆的度假勝地
reviews.text: 很具有度假特色的絕美villa，讓我們有個很不錯的假期；面海的游泳池日落時很美，房間內的擺設讓人很有放鬆感，雖然離熱鬧的大街區有段距離，但附近就有機車出租及local travel agency，很方便！
reviews.positives: 房間很美、面海游泳池很具吸引力

reviews.title: Fantastic. I will go back again.
reviews.positives: Everything. Location. Landscape. Villa.

reviews.title: 萬麗酒店還是有保證的
reviews.text: 萬麗酒店位於拉邁海灘北面的半島海灣內，離拉邁中心區有一定距離，但租車自駕還是很方便的，而且比出租車划算多了。酒店內非常悠閒舒適，有兩個大小泳池，適合小朋友玩耍。一個50迷長的標準池位於標準客房區，離海較遠，很適合游泳鍛鍊；另一個是疊級泳池，座落在別墅區，在海灘旁。但可惜蘇梅島ZF全面砌築防坡堤，以免海沙流失，導致嚴重生態破壞，海灘附近形成死水區域，海藻生長過度(查汶海灘存在同樣問題)，可謂大煞風景。
reviews.positives: 服務，餐飲，娛樂

reviews.title: 性價比高的一次住宿，連續住了4晚，環境舒適
reviews.text: 環境不錯，住了4晚private pool villa, 很清靜，設施不是最頂級，而且都比較舊了，但工作人員超親切，總之今次都是很好的住宿體驗。給了一次我跟老公的re honeymoon!

reviews.title: 泳池不錯,房間清潔,鄰近海邊/海灘
reviews.positives: 泳池不錯,房間清潔,鄰近海邊/海灘

reviews.title: 그럭저럭
reviews.text:
풀빌라는 추천하지 않습니다.
차라리 디럭스가 더 좋은듯 합니다.
그리고 피자가 정말 맛있습니다.
음식을 조금이라도 남기면 개미군단이 생깁니다.
물론 전통적인 형태의 방은 좋습니다.
reviews.positives: 직원의 친절함

reviews.title: 아기자기한 리조트
reviews.text:
룸을 상당이 깨끗하며, 오선뷰 였는데도 오션은 보이지 않아요~
숙박은 일반디럭스 룸이었고 아늑하고 아기자기한 느낌을 줍니다.
스페셜한 느낌은 별로 없었지만 5성급답습니다..
다리미가 있어서 정말 좋았어요
reviews.positives: 해변가 위치하여 바다와 풀을 자유롭게 이용할수 있어요

reviews.title: 정말 편안히 잘 다녀왔습니다~
reviews.text:
우선 호텔에 전화하여 공항픽업을 요청했습니다. 픽업비용을 지불해야 하지만 따로 택시를 잡아서 타고 가는 비용과 크게 다르지 않았습니다. 비행기가 좀 딜레이되서 늦게 도착하는 바람에 픽업 직원이 많이 기다려야 했지만, 웃는 얼굴로 친절히 맞아주셨어요~

호텔에서 시내로 나가는 무료셔틀이 하루에 두 차례 있어서 편리합니다. 나갔다가 호텔로 돌아올때에도 셔틀이 데릴러 오구요. 저희는 시간이 애매해서 돌아올때는 택시를 이용했어요. 

객실 상태는 매우 깨끗하고 태국 분위기가 물씬나는 인테리어와 특히 머무는 동안 모기 한번 물리지 않았다는 것에 만족합니다 ^^ 
호텔 내에 레스토랑 겸 바가 몇 개 있는데 저녁에 바다를 보며 식사할 수 있어서 매우 분위기가 좋습니다. 

직원들의 친절은 말할 것도 없네요. 매우 만족합니다~ 다음에 다시 가면 또 찾을 것 같은 호텔이에요!
reviews.positives: 청결, 친절, 서비스

reviews.title: 휴양을 원한다면 르네상스 코사무이 :)
reviews.text: 차웽의 번잡함이 싫어서 선택을 했던 리조트입니다. 정말 친절한 스텝들과 조용하고 평화로운 풀. 맛있는 룸서비스와 식당. 저희 부부도 너무 좋았지만 6세 아이가 제일 잘 즐기다 왔습니다. 풀의 깊이도 적당하고, 풀에서 마시는 맥주와 땡모반은 뷰와 함께 정말 좋았어요. 그리고 타이 마사지는 적당한 가격에 (외부보단 비싸지만 다른 리조트에 비해서 괜찮은 가격)만족도 높은 서비스를 받았습니다. 코사무이를 다시 찾는다면 단연 르네상스 코사무이에서 묵을 예정입니다~
reviews.positives: 친절한 스텝, 유아와 함께 놀기에 좋은 풀, 높은 만족도의 마사지

reviews.title: 정말 조용한 호텔
reviews.text:
정말 조용하게 하지만 모든피로를 풀 수 있을 정도로 편안하게 보내다 왔습니다.
직원 서비스 좋고요, 특히 아침은 무조건 포함시키세요. 여지껏 다녀본 호텔 중에서 아침은 No.1 입니다. 첨에 찾아가기 힘들었습니다. 렌트 했으니까요, 지도만 보고, 운전석도 틀린 상태에서 운전하다 보니깐, 야간에 많이 헤맸습니다. 코사무이는 무조건 렌트 할 필요는 없을 것 같네요. 현지에서 진행되는 모든 여행 상품이 픽업 서비스 무료 입니다.
reviews.positives: 숲속 정원의 가든

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: 交通特别差，服务态度不好，房间非常小，比苏梅其他酒店性价比差太多

reviews.title: 入住体验不是很好
reviews.text: 先说服务差强人意，不符合一家五星级酒店的标准，酒店两个区域由一条公路相隔，到酒店需要走一段一公里多的烂路，不是在主干道上，酒店房间卫生还不错就是室外环境卫生一般，特别是泳池不是很干净，房间卫生间马桶和淋浴之间没有做分区隔离，可能是处于一楼安全私密性不高，酒店走廊还安有一块不小的玻璃，晚上还有乌鸦，走廊又很长，怪恐怖的，酒店用车师傅的水平不高，就是丰田的卡罗拉一类车型，价格不菲。总体感受不佳，不推荐。

reviews.title: 员工服务实在太差劲
reviews.text: 晚上去餐厅吃自助餐，本来提前定好了阳台的座位，到点过去结果都安排给其他人，问服务员竟然说他们也预定了，真不知道为什么可以一个座位可以给两个人预定。房间打扫卫生也很不认真，打扫完后房间还比较脏。酒店餐厅自助餐根本没什么东西吃，作为万豪集团的长期会员，这是我住过最差劲的一个酒店

reviews.title: 一般
reviews.text: 我家里住，我陪他们CHECK IN。首先说酒店设计，想必是非常有历史的酒店了.再说门口的帮忙拦车，招待的门童，不是特别友善。入住的一个房间，因为周围发电机噪音，房间太吵不可以住，跟前台交涉很久，一开始说一间房间都没有了，都住满了，不给我们调。后来我几经争取，他们说1个小时以后会有一个房间让我们住。明显就是一开始让我们凑合住噪音响的房子。这点我特别不喜欢。总之有些失望。我总觉得RENAISSANCE是个好酒店，可是这次真的给人感觉非常不好。
reviews.positives: 没有什么特别好的

reviews.title: 海滩比较小、早餐味道一般
reviews.text: 这家万丽的风格是典型的泰式东南亚风格的。订的是池畔房，但客户比较显旧，客户面积较大，但别墅内的泳池较小，酒店有定点出发到拉迈和查文的班车，但班次很少，每天只二班，我们有二个宝宝，订了班车，但为宝宝洗澡迟到了。只有一个电话打来说最迟等10分种，等我们出去，班车已经开走了，让我们的感觉非常不好。早餐品种不多，味道尚可。海滩无法游泳，泳池也比较小，晚上7点泳池就没灯光了。可以游泳的时间不多。服务人员态度还是比较亲切的。总之，下次应该不会再选择这里。
reviews.positives: 有中文服务人员让我感觉比较亲切，有班车尽管班次比较少，早餐服务人员比较热情

reviews.title: 位置偏僻但装修很好
reviews.text:
晚上6点多到达,即送上欢迎雪糕,加小孩3份,很贴心.
沙滩和海不太漂亮,游泳池感觉不够大气.
自助早餐人较少,没有我爱吃的山竹.
reviews.positives: 服务好

reviews.title: 不错的体验
reviews.text: 酒店在拉迈海滩的边缘，先说海滩，景色一流，但沙子真的太粗，很扎脚，不太适合小朋友挖沙子。推荐另一个海滩，不可错过！坐酒店的安排的车子去的，就在酒店旁边的sliver beach，一个十分小的海湾，沙子很细，水很清澈，滩很浅，各种小贝壳小鱼，可以放心让小朋友自己玩。再来说说酒店的房间，入住的是泳池别墅，独门独户的小院子，私密性比较好，带了两个小朋友，他们在小泳池里玩玩，爽歪歪，不过房间略显陈旧，卫浴设施都比较旧了，所有的下水都很慢，真的很慢！浴室是一个马赛克做成的大池子，没有手持淋浴头，给小宝宝洗澡略微不方便。沙发和床都很舒服，尤其是沙发，比较宽，横着躺很爽。最后说早饭，吃了三天，基本没有换品种，品种比较单一，也算够吃了，比较喜欢牛角包，可能是偏爱，每个酒店的牛角包都好吃！另外，做了酒店的SPA，3300泰铢两小时，性价比不高，体验很一般，不太推荐喔！

reviews.title: 空间小、沙滩差
reviews.text:
泰国酒店服务是一贯的好，酒店位于苏梅岛的一个角落，距离机场居中，不远不近。
房间比我预想的要小得多，也没有精油的洗发水、沐浴露。
不过没有水了，还可以再送。
有好有坏吧。
reviews.positives: 建筑风格有韵味、安静、舒适

reviews.title: 感觉非常棒
reviews.text: 离苏梅的最后两晚都在这个酒店，因为住过国内的万丽酒店觉得很棒，所以定了苏梅岛的，果然很不错，这次带着4岁的女儿一起，她超级开心，并且这次免费帮我们升级成了套房，觉得很幸运。

reviews.title: 舒适满意
reviews.text: 拉迈海滩选了renaissance，总体还是满意的，虽然只有短短2天。我们住的是deluxe，在离海滩有些距离的单独的楼里，其他都是villa，估计价格也villa。楼前是长长的泳池，很喜欢，我们住在一楼，下水很方便哈。早餐品种丰富，有适合中国人口味的煎饺和粥；私人海滩不错，只是离我们住的房间有些远，只去散步了一圈。最赞的是大床超级舒服，非常解乏。阳台的按摩浴缸很爽，但由于在室外，还是在一楼，泡澡时要放下所有帘子，否则只能春光无限了。2点不满意：1预订时候说是免费wifi，结果到了地方必须要加入酒店会员才能免费；2酒店位置有点偏，出门啥都没有，酒店巴士班次少，时间也不方便，建议住这里就踏实在酒店呆着，好好享受二人世界，哪都别去了。前台有个中国籍的姑娘，沟通完全没问题呵呵。
reviews.positives: 舒适度、多语言服务、早餐

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: 亲切友善的服务态度，整洁舒适的住宿环境，良好的酒店设施，能给人带来一个愉快的假期。就是位置稍微有点偏僻，周边餐厅选择较少，需要走一段路才能到购物点。

reviews.title: 苏梅岛住的最满意的一家酒店
reviews.text: 作为五星的话性价比在当地算很高的了，位置有点靠里，离拉迈海滩大概5分钟的摩托车，员工超级热情，有中文前台，很nice，这一点超级满意！酒店餐厅味道很赞，早餐种类也很多，各种水果等。定了蜜月套房，回去发现酒店送了香槟，超级惊喜！我们定的是独栋别墅，是很多房子连在一起，有院子分开，隐秘性一般，别墅泳池很小，不能游泳的，因为在前排别墅，视野很好。设施都很好，床很舒适。酒店的浴缸和淋浴是连在一起的，没有单独的浴缸，这点不像五星级呀，好在设计比较别致，沐浴产品等都很好！很奇怪很多酒店都没有晾衣服的地方，酒店内部也没有烘干机等，要洗衣服的话也是送到外面去洗...要说不满意的地方那就是酒店的窗帘了，很高很难拉！

reviews.title: 酒店值得推荐
reviews.text: 酒店位置其实还行，只是要从一条小路走进去，走得快的话也就5min的路程，到了大路上有几家饭店，价格挺实惠的，还有一家family mart和一家药店，不远的地方就是大名鼎鼎的Cliff Bar&Restaurant。酒店在check-in时即有解暑的冰淇淋和冰凉的毛巾送上，凉快啊。我们住的房型是Deluxe Sea View，阳台处确实能看到海景，不得不说拉迈的海比查汶漂亮，坐在阳台的休闲椅上喝杯咖啡欣赏这一切很惬意。早餐也不错，虽说品种不是特别丰富，但味道都还挺好的，餐厅员工服务也很好，去过一次以后就能记得你的房号和用餐人数，这一点让人印象深刻。总的来说万丽还是一个值得信赖的酒店，下次去苏梅岛住拉迈海滩的话应该还会选择这里。
reviews.positives: 食物、服务、环境

reviews.title: 一流的酒店、一流的服务~
reviews.text: 很棒的一次入住体验，遇到的每一位员工都非常热心和体贴，这次分别入住了园景房和海滨别墅，但是感觉园景房的设施要稍微好一点，家具也比较新，别墅可能是木制的关系，给人有些老旧的感觉，而且有些设备还有些故障，不过别墅的无敌海景却是是非常赞。
reviews.positives: 服务和环境~
